name: Openfish (Koifish) — a macOS menu-bar AI that, on a keypress, reads the field you're standing in and the visible thread, drafts a reply in your own voice with your own API key, and drops it at the cursor; hold a key to dictate. Local-first, BYOK, no backend, no telemetry.
product: Openfish (Koifish) — a macOS menu-bar AI that, on a keypress, reads the field you're standing in and the visible thread, drafts a reply in your own voice with your own API key, and drops it at the cursor; hold a key to dictate. Local-first, BYOK, no backend, no telemetry.

boxes.name: Hotkey Listener
boxes.responds: Tap/hold trigger doesn't fire, fires on the wrong key, or won't re-arm after a rebind — check the global event tap and the modifier-tap detector.

boxes.name: Focused-Field & Context Reader
boxes.responds: Reads an empty field or the wrong thread, or Accessibility isn't detected as granted so it's blind — check AX reads, breadcrumb/page-context extraction, and the trust gate.

boxes.name: Microphone Capture
boxes.responds: Dictation captures no audio, mic permission is denied, or the live level meter is dead — check AVAudioEngine recording and mic TCC.

boxes.name: Core Loop
boxes.responds: A trigger produces nothing end-to-end, generations don't supersede/cancel correctly, accept/reject records against the wrong profile, or app lifecycle/menu wiring breaks — check the orchestrator.

boxes.name: Prompt Builder
boxes.sub: writes the instructions for the model
boxes.responds: Replies are off-voice, ignore the thread/context, or come out the wrong length or format — check prompt assembly and what (style, recent activity, brief) gets injected.

boxes.name: AI Providers
boxes.responds: Generation or transcription fails — 401/429/network, broken SSE streaming, wrong endpoint or model id — check provider wiring, the request transport, and the key/base-URL.

boxes.name: Style Learning
boxes.responds: Replies stop sounding like the user, kept/edited drafts aren't learned, or the interaction log grows unbounded — check the per-profile refresh pipeline and the bounded log.

boxes.name: Profiles & Brief
boxes.responds: The wrong persona is active, switching a profile doesn't take effect, or the user brief isn't injected/decoded — check the profile store and brief encoding.

boxes.name: Activity Memory
boxes.responds: Cross-window context is stale/missing, the buffer won't clear when turned off, or it captures something it shouldn't (secure fields, own windows) — check the opt-in activity buffer and its watching indicator.

boxes.name: Text Inserter
boxes.sub: types the reply at your cursor
boxes.responds: The reply lands in the wrong place, gets garbled by autocorrect, or nothing is inserted (dropped synthesized keystrokes / backspace drift) — check the paste/keystroke insertion path.

boxes.name: Draft Surfaces
boxes.responds: The review panel / inline placeholder / dictation HUD won't show, streamed text doesn't render, or errors never surface as a toast — check the transient draft surfaces.

boxes.name: Menu-Bar Status Item
boxes.responds: The status item is missing, its menu actions are dead, or the fish shows the wrong state (recording / thinking / watching) — check the status item and icon renderer.

boxes.name: Settings Window
boxes.responds: Settings won't open, a provider/key/hotkey can't be entered or doesn't apply on save, or the Accessibility permission banner is wrong — check the settings window.

boxes.name: Keychain / API Keys
boxes.responds: An API key won't save or load, or the Keychain prompts in a loop / denies access — check the Keychain store.

boxes.name: Config & Data Storage
boxes.responds: A preference doesn't persist, the data/profile folder resolves wrong, or logs are missing for diagnosis — check UserDefaults config, AppPaths, and logging.

districts.name: PLACE — put it at the cursor
